member.name: T:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService
member.summary: Defines the contract for maintenance request management operations.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService.GetAllAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of all maintenance requests.
member.param: The number of items per page.
member.returns: A paginated result containing maintenance request data.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a single maintenance request by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the maintenance request.
member.returns: A Result containing the request data if found.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService.AddAsync(Core.DTOs.RequestDtos.RequestDto)
member.returns: A Result indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService.UpdateAsync(System.Int32,Core.DTOs.RequestDtos.UpdateRequestDto)
member.param: The unique identifier of the request to update.
member.returns: A Result indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a maintenance request by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the request to delete.
member.returns: A Result indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService.UpdateStatusAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates the status of a maintenance request.
member.param: The unique identifier of the request.
The new status value to apply.
member.returns: A Result indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService.GetRecentActivity
member.summary: Retrieves the most recent maintenance requests for dashboard activity feed.
member.returns: A Result containing a collection of recent maintenance requests.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IRequestService.GetDashboardStatsAsync
member.summary: Retrieves aggregated statistics for the admin dashboard.
member.returns: A Result containing dashboard statistics data.
